privacy.title: Privacy & cookies policy
privacy.intro: This page explains what data may be collected, why it is collected, and how it is handled.
privacy.lead: This page explains what data may be collected, why it is collected, and how it is handled.
privacy.dataText: The contact form collects: first name, last name, email, phone (optional), subject, and message. This data is used only to reply to your request. Booking dates and booking details are handled through Airbnb, not stored as bookings on this website.
privacy.dataLines: The contact form collects: first name, last name, email, phone (optional), subject, and message.
This data is used only to reply to your request.
The contact form is protected by Google reCAPTCHA v3, which may analyze technical signals to assess spam risk.
Booking dates and booking details are handled through Airbnb, not stored as bookings on this website.
privacy.purposeText: This information is used solely to respond to your booking or information request. It is never shared or sold.
privacy.retentionText: Communications are kept for the time needed to follow up on your stay, then archived in accordance with legal obligations applicable to seasonal rentals.
privacy.cookiesLines: This website currently does not set its own advertising cookies.
Technical cookies may be set by third-party services (hosting and infrastructure).
When the contact form is used, Google reCAPTCHA v3 may process technical data and return an anti-spam score.
privacy.rightsText: Under GDPR, you have a right of access, rectification and deletion of your data. To exercise these rights, write to us at
privacy.rightsBody: You may request access, correction or deletion of your data by writing to lesportesdemontafilan@gmail.com.

home.hero.imageAlt: Enclosed garden at Les Portes de Montafilan cottage
home.hero.titleBefore: In the heart of the Emerald Coast, between
home.hero.body: Les Portes de Montafilan - family cottage in Corseul, in the heart of the Emerald Coast, between Dinan, Saint-Malo and Cap Fréhel.
home.intro.title: A bright, simple and welcoming retreat.
home.intro.p1: An 85 sqm house fully renovated in 2018, with a bright living room opening onto a fully equipped kitchen. Two bedrooms (one double bed, two single beds), one bathroom, two separate toilets and a workspace.
home.intro.p2: Outside, a large 350 sqm enclosed garden includes a one-car garage, outdoor parking for 2 cars (up to 3 depending on vehicle size) and a dining area with plancha.
home.spaces.title: Everything you need to feel at home.
home.amenities.title: Everything is ready for your stay.
home.amenities.body: Amenities are grouped by category so you can find what you need at a glance.
home.amenities.missing: Not included: no carbon monoxide detector.
home.gallery.title: The cottage, room by room.
home.gallery.body: Choose a section to browse only those photos.
home.region.title: A getaway on your doorstep.
home.region.p1: Les Portes de Montafilan is a cottage in Côtes-d'Armor, set in the heart of the Emerald Coast. It is a practical base for discovering Dinan, Saint-Malo, Saint-Cast-le-Guildo, Saint-Jacut-de-la-Mer, Erquy and Cap Fréhel.
home.region.p2: Between harbours, small character towns, lakes, beaches and coastal trails, the area is easy to explore at your own pace - perfect for a weekend or a longer holiday.
home.region.eventsBody: Festivals, markets, nature outings and family events bring the destination to life throughout the year. This selection can evolve with the seasons.
home.why.title: Discover northern Brittany from Corseul.
home.reviews.quote: "Very beautiful accommodation: spacious, bright and clean, with two lovely bedrooms and a large living room with bay windows. We enjoyed the large enclosed garden and quality amenities."
home.reviews.body: Jocelyne was welcoming, available and gave us great tips for visits. An ideal base to explore the region, the coast and nearby towns.
home.booking.title: Ready to plan your stay?
home.booking.body: Select your dates for an instant estimate. The base price covers the nights; the cleaning fee is added to the booking. The final price will be confirmed on Airbnb before booking.

home.footer.body: Warm cottage in Corseul, in the heart of the Emerald Coast.
home.footer.copyright: Les Portes de Montafilan - Corseul, Brittany

home.spaces.items.d: Bright living room opening onto a fully equipped kitchen.
One double bed, two single beds, and a baby cot on request.
One complete bathroom and two separate toilets.
A dedicated desk area in a separate room.
350 sqm enclosed garden, outdoor furniture, outdoor dining area and plancha with exterior power socket.
Private one-car garage and outdoor parking for 2 cars, up to 3 depending on vehicle size.

home.amenities.items.title: Family
items: Bathroom towels available as an option

home.amenities.items.title: Comfort & services
items: Cleaning fee added to the booking
Well-behaved pets accepted with a supplement

home.amenities.items.title: Parking
items: Up to 3 spaces depending on vehicle size

home.region.nearbyHighlights.name: Dinan
home.region.nearbyHighlights.text: for medieval streets, ramparts and the harbour on the Rance.

home.region.nearbyHighlights.name: Saint-Cast-le-Guildo
home.region.nearbyHighlights.text: for wide beaches, seaside walks and watersports.

home.region.nearbyHighlights.name: Saint-Jacut-de-la-Mer
home.region.nearbyHighlights.text: for its peninsula atmosphere, eleven beaches and low-tide access to the Ebihens islands.

home.region.nearbyHighlights.name: Erquy
home.region.nearbyHighlights.text: for the fishing harbour, sandy beaches and sweeping views from the cape.

home.region.nearbyHighlights.name: Port de Dahouët
home.region.nearbyHighlights.text: for a characterful stroll among quays, maritime heritage and bay light.

home.region.nearbyHighlights.name: Jugon-les-Lacs
home.region.nearbyHighlights.text: for a nature pause with a small character town, lake, fishing and gentle outdoor activities.

home.region.events: Festival Bobital L'Armor à Sons, a major music event near Dinan
Fête des Remparts de Dinan, bringing the medieval town to life
Local markets, nature outings, guided visits and family-friendly events depending on the season
home.activities: Zoo de la Bourbansais - Pleugueneuc (29 km)
Erquy, Port de Dahouët and Pléneuf-Val-André
Escape Games - Erquy, Dinan, Lamballe, Dinard, Saint-Malo

home.why.items.d: From Corseul, you can easily reach Dinan old town, the beaches of Saint-Cast-le-Guildo, Saint-Jacut-de-la-Mer, Erquy and the Cap Fréhel coastline.
Alternate between beaches, walks in the Rance valley, a stop at Port de Dahouët, lake time in Jugon-les-Lacs and medieval sites such as Dinan or Château de la Hunaudaye.
An enclosed outdoor space, a central position on the Emerald Coast and easy road access to the major destinations of northern Brittany.

home.practical: Well-behaved pets accepted with a supplement

home.faqs.q: Is the cottage close to the sea?
home.faqs.a: Yes. Several Côtes-d'Armor beaches are reachable in 15 to 25 minutes by car.

home.faqs.q: Is this a good base between Dinan and Saint-Malo?
home.faqs.a: Yes. Corseul is ideally located for exploring Dinan, Saint-Malo, Dinard and Cap Fréhel.

home.faqs.q: What kind of stay is this cottage best suited for?
home.faqs.a: It is ideal for a high-quality family holiday in Brittany, with visits, beaches and local discoveries.
The cleaning fee is added to the booking. Bathroom towels are available as an option.
Well-behaved pets may be accepted with a supplement. An additional charge may also apply if the cottage is left abnormally dirty.
